description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in the Cross floaters from lotto. This pair can be teamed with cargo shorts and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic straps on the forefoot and ankle for comfort and protection Velcro strap enclosures on the forefoot and on the ankle strap to customise Fit Lightly padded straps for snug fit Midsole Cushioned foam footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Lugs through the centre of the foot for great grip Flex grooves along the periphery of the outsole for flexible movement of the feet shoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
